steps: Total children = 60. Football = 20, Cricket = 8. So Football + Cricket = 28. Remaining children = 60 - 28 = 32. Remaining children are Swimming (S) and Tennis (T). Given S = 3T. So S + T = 3T + T = 4T = 32. Therefore T = 32 / 4 = 8. Then S = 3 * 8 = 24. Check: 20 + 24 + 8 + 8 = 60. Option C is 24.
